Confidential Term Sheet — Proposed acquisition of Murrawin Minerals Pty Ltd by Quokka Ridge Holdings Limited (non-binding save for confidentiality, exclusivity, and costs).
Target: Murrawin Minerals Pty Ltd (ACN 614 829 375; ABN 83 471 902 615); Registered office: Level 22, 77 Harbour Crescent, Murradoo NSW 2991.
Buyer: Quokka Ridge Holdings Limited (ACN 643 210 598; ABN 51 908 442 170); adviser Karrinji Partners Pty Ltd (fictional).
Consideration: A$38,000,000 for 75% of issued shares; 10% deposit to escrow trust a/c BSB 123-456, Account 10293847 (Quokka Ridge Trust).
Structure: Cash on completion plus 24‑month earn‑out; proposed ASX listing within 18 months subject to ASX Listing Rules 1.1 and 11.1.
Conditions precedent: FIRB approval (if applicable); ASIC relief for financial assistance; shareholder approval under Corporations Act s260B; material permits confirmed.
Confidentiality/MNPI: Information herein is not generally available and could be material to ASX‑quoted products; recipients must not trade (Corporations Act ss 1042A, 1043A) or disclose except to advisers.
Privacy: Handling of employee and contractor data must comply with the Privacy Act 1988 (Cth); credit checks and payroll onboarding require written consent; no health records collected pre‑completion.
Contact: Ms. Elara Quinn, CFO, elara.quinn@murrawinminerals.com.au, +61 2 8123 4567; office address as above for notices.
Identification: Company IDs — Murrawin ACN 614 829 375; ABN 83 471 902 615; Buyer ABN 51 908 442 170; sample ABN 12 345 678 901 (invalid checksum—placeholder only).
Site access: For flight manifests only, Ms. Quinn’s AU passport ref N1234567 may be shown to carrier; no copies retained by Buyer or its advisers.
Helpline/generic fields: Public enquiries (generic helpline, not personal data): 1800 123 123; Form fields: TFN _________ ; HIN _________ ; Role‑only signatory: Company Secretary.
Settlement mechanics: Escrow agent Loddon & Co. Lawyers (fictional), trust a/c BSB 062-999, Account 44990012; completion at adviser’s offices or via electronic execution.
Miscellaneous: Exclusivity 45 days; this term sheet does not constitute a binding offer to acquire; completion subject to due diligence, any ASX waiver, and execution of long‑form documents.
